subject: Quick chat about Senior Backend Engineer at Stripe?
body:
Hi,

Thanks for applying to the Senior Backend Engineer role at Stripe. I'd love to set up a 30-minute chat to learn more about your background and tell you about what we're building on the platform infrastructure team.

Do any of these times work?
  - Wed 2pm PT
  - Thu 10am PT
  - Fri 3pm PT

If none of those work, just send me a few windows that do and I'll find one.

Best,
Sarah Chen
Technical Recruiter, Stripe
